engagement.name: Synthex Agency Retainer — CCW
engagement.supersedes_note: This SOW supersedes the existing $2,750/mo arrangement between Unite-Group and CCW. Phill must cancel the prior subscription once the new Stripe subscription is live. No double-billing.

stripe_product.name: Synthex Agency Retainer
stripe_product.description: Monthly marketing retainer — 4 weekly content batches (blog + 4 social + newsletter) delivered against the CCW BrandConfig. Includes monthly performance scorecard and brand-guardian QA.

milestones.label: Signing deposit — Month 1 + Month 2 prepaid
deliverables: Kickoff call scheduled within 5 business days
Month 2 prepaid as rolling forward deposit (reconciled on termination per §4.1)
milestones.payment_trigger: Payment Link sent to Toby via Phill; paid at signing

milestones.label: Month 3 retainer invoice
deliverables: Monthly performance scorecard delivered by 7th business day

milestones.label: Month 4 retainer invoice
deliverables: Monthly performance scorecard delivered by 7th business day
Brand-guardian Phase B telemetry capture begins (per §3.3)

milestones.label: Month 5 retainer invoice
deliverables: Monthly performance scorecard delivered by 7th business day

milestones.label: Month 6 retainer invoice — final initial-term invoice
deliverables: Monthly performance scorecard delivered by 7th business day
Renewal conversation — month-to-month rolls automatically unless either party gives 30-day written notice

stripe_constraints.supersedes_action: If existing CCW customer found, attach new product to that customer (do not create duplicate). Phill cancels the prior $2,750/mo subscription once the new payment link is paid.

stripe_minted_2026_05_16.superseding_finding: BRIEF SAID 'superseding $2,750/mo'. ACTUAL: the existing sub_1TXBVjGib5mMf28dQwKOlS4a on this customer is a DIFFERENT product (CCW-CRM SaaS, prod_UWDwOiE8VWA7Yf, $2,500 ex / $2,750 inc GST per month). Wiki SOW v1.1 §14 explicitly states the SaaS is a separate agreement unaffected by this SOW. NO subscription was cancelled or modified — Phill to disambiguate whether the new retainer truly supersedes the SaaS (which would mean cancelling the active SaaS subscription) or whether they coexist.
